spells.name: Discordant Roar

spells.name: Colossal Strikes
spells.description: The Colossal Horror unleashes a series of three strikes at its current target over 1 sec, inflicting 388505 Physical damage and 135977 Nature damage with each strike.

spells.name: Unstable Form
spells.description: Creatures formed from Chimaerus' Corrupted Devastation are unstable.

spells.name: Consume
spells.description: Chimaerus consumes the essence of its enemies, inflicting 178712 Nature damage every 2 sec for 10 sec. Upon finishing its channel, Chimaerus knocks players away and consumes any remaining Manifestations, casting Cannibalized Essence for each Manifestation consumed.

spells.name: Ravenous Dive
spells.description: Chimaerus descends to the ground, inflicting 116551 Physical damage to all players upon landing and knocking them into the air. Any remaining Manifestations are consumed, causing Chimaerus to cast Cannibalized Essence for each Manifestation consumed.

spells.name: Corrupted Devastation
spells.description: Chimaerus sweeps across its den, exhaling corruption that inflicts 1165514 Nature damage to players standing in the area and stuns them for 1 sec. The spewed corruption coalesces Manifestations and leaves behind Alndust Essence .

spells.name: Alnsight

spells.name: Alnshroud

spells.name: Cannibalized Essence
spells.description: Cannibalizing a Manifestation inflicts 388505 Nature damage to all players and heals Chimaerus for 500% of the Manifestation's remaining vitality. In addition, Chimaerus' damage done is increased by 100%. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Alndust Essence
spells.description: A pool of essence that inflicts 58276 Nature damage every 1 sec to players within it and reduces movement speed by 50%.

spells.name: Rift Shroud
spells.description: Chimaerus is protected by the shroud of its den while in the air, reducing damage taken by 99%.

spells.name: Caustic Phlegm
spells.description: Chimaerus launches globs of phlegm at all players, inflicting 32168 Nature damage every 1 sec for 20 sec.

spells.name: Rift Sickness
spells.description: As each Manifestation emerges within the Rift, they release a wave of sickness, causing all players to absorb the next 43719 healing received.

spells.name: Insatiable
spells.description: Chimaerus feasts on any Manifestations in Reality within its reach, casting Cannibalized Essence for every Manifestation consumed.

spells.name: Rift Vulnerability
spells.description: Exposure from the Rift increases damage taken from Alndust Upheaval by 600% for 1.5 min. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Consuming Miasma
spells.description: Chimaerus surrounds several players with ravenous energy, causing them to suffer 69931 Nature damage every 1.5 sec for 1 min. Upon removal, the target erupts with Lingering Miasma and consumes Alndust Essence within 10 yards.

spells.name: Lingering Miasma

spells.name: Rift Emergence
spells.description: Chimaerus unleashes an unearthly roar, inflicting 213678 Nature damage to all players and causing Manifestations to emerge throughout the Rift.

spells.name: Alndust Upheaval
spells.description: Chimaerus tears a hole in Reality, inflicting 1165514 Physical damage to its current target and inflicting 93241 Nature damage to several players. Victims are knocked into the air and gain Alnsight .

spells.name: Rift Madness
spells.description: Chimaerus causes several players within the Rift to succumb to madness, inflicting 77701 Nature damage to players within 6 yards and horrifying them, causing them to suffer 19425 Nature damage every 1 sec. This effect increases in intensity every 3 sec. Allies outside the Rift can stand nearby the victims to swap realms with them after a short duration, saving them from the madness.

spells.name: Rending Tear
spells.description: Chimaerus slashes in the direction of a nearby target, inflicting 233103 Physical damage to players in a frontal cone, causing them to bleed for 124321 Physical damage every 1.5 sec for 6 sec and knocking them away.

spells.name: Fearsome Cry

spells.name: Ravenous Leap
spells.description: Requires Hunter Leap forward and claw deeply into the flesh of your enemy, bleeding them for (800% of Attack Power) damage over 8 sec.

spells.name: Null Corona
spells.description: Alleria places a shell of Void magic around a player that absorbs 1987236 healing. If Null Corona is dispelled, the remaining absorb jumps to another random player.

spells.name: Silverstrike Barrage
spells.description: Uncontrolled silver-lined arrows fire from Alleria, inflicting 116551 Arcane damage and removing Void effects from players struck. Being hit with an arrow increases damage taken from Silverstrike Barrage by 500% for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Voidstalker Sting
spells.description: Alleria fires a Void-tipped arrow at several players, inflicting 33023 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 min. This effect stacks.

spells.description: Alleria applies a Ranger Captain's Mark to random players within 40 yards for 6 sec. Upon expiration, she fires a Silverstrike Ricochet at them.

spells.description: Reverberating darkness knocks the target upwards and increases their Physical damage taken by 300% for 12 sec. The cosmic tremors additionally inflict 242815 Shadow damage to all other players.

spells.name: Void Remnants
spells.description: Void energy remains on the ground, inflicting 233103 Shadow damage to all players within it every 1 sec.

spells.name: Void Expulsion

spells.name: Void Barrage

spells.name: Cosmic Infusion

spells.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, Salhadaar is overwhelmed by the Void. He unravels violently, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage to all players every 1 sec and taking 25% increased damage for 20 sec.   Upon expiration, Salhadaar leaves behind Torturous Extract .

spells.name: Despotic Command

spells.name: Shadow Phalanx

spells.name: Gloomtouched
spells.description: A dark malady drips from those in contact with Gloom, inflicting 194252 Shadow damage plus an additional 87414 Shadow damage every 3 sec for 12 sec to players within 0 yards of the contacting player . This effect stacks. Upon removal, Gloomtouched applies Diminish.

spells.name: Rakfang
spells.description: Ezzorak strikes his primary target, inflicting 825573 Physical damage and 242816 Shadow damage. This attack empowers Ezzorak's melee attacks, causing them to absorb the next 66241 healing. This effect stacks, increasing in intensity each Rakfang until Rakfang strikes a new target.

spells.name: Null Breath
spells.description: The caster periodically breaths void fire to all enemies in front of them, inflicting 155402 Shadow damage.

spells.name: Impale

spells.name: Aura of Light

spells.name: Grappling Maw
spells.description: While flying, the dragon lashes their primary target in cosmic entanglement, inflicting between 233103 and (233103 * 10) Shadow damage, increasing in damage as distance between the dragon and their target increases. The dragon then pulls the distant target nearby.

spells.name: Soulburst

spells.name: Voidlink
spells.description: The life force of creatures in the Voidlink is shared. Damage received by any of these creatures is copied to the other creatures in the Link.

spells.name: Rift Slash
spells.description: The Rift Simulacrum strikes its current target with a draining touch, inflicting 660458 Physical damage to the player and reducing all of their stats by 10% for 20 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Cosmic Barrier
spells.description: A void barrier surrounds the Rift Simulacrum, absorbing damage equal to 15% of its maximum health. While this barrier persists, it inflicts 23310 Shadow damage to all players every 1 sec.

spells.name: Empowering Darkness
spells.description: The Rift Simulacrum grants Alleria 10% reduced damage taken and 10% increased damage done every 1 sec while she is within 25 yards of it. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Umbral Tether
spells.description: Void magic binds the Voidspawn to existence, preventing it from dying.

spells.name: Coalesced Form
spells.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, the Voidspawn permanently gains 300% movement speed, 500% damage done, and immunity to crowd controlling effects.

spells.name: Void Barrage

spells.name: Tear Asunder

spells.name: Three-Headed Slam

spells.name: Dark Goo

spells.name: Fixate

spells.description: The Blistercreep explodes upon death, inflicting 271953 Shadow damage to players within 8 yards, increasing their damage taken by 100% for 30 sec and knocking them away. The explosion also inflicts 97126 Shadow damage to all players.

spells.name: Creep Spit

spells.name: Hinder Quarry

spells.name: Divine Shield

spells.name: Forbearance

spells.name: Exorcism

spells.name: Aura of Peace

spells.name: Sacred Shield

spells.name: Tyr's Wrath

spells.name: Elekk Charge

spells.name: Dark Resilience
spells.description: Upon reaching 35% health remaining, the Voidmaw approaches the closest void-claimed space to restore its health.

spells.name: Hobbled
spells.description: While at 35% health remaining, the Voidmaw's movement speed is reduced by 75%.

spells.name: Pitch Bulwark

Players caught in the image's blast suffer 58276 Holy damage and are disoriented for 5 sec. Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by 30% and damage dealt to Nysarra by 300% but inflicts 27195 Holy damage every 1 sec until she recovers.

spells.name: Power of the Domanaar
spells.description: Grants the ability: Void Fury 500 yd range Attack speed 4 sec cooldown A relentless flurry of attacks on the caster's primary target every 0.8 sec for 6 sec, each inflicting 77701 Shadow damage.

spells.name: Oblivion's Wrath
spells.description: Averzian launches void lances outward, inflicting 350466 Shadow damage to players in their path and knocking them back.

spells.name: Strength in Shadows

spells.name: Void Rupture
spells.description: The Abyssal Voidshaper claims territory for Averzian, inflicting 349654 Shadow damage to players within 12 yards and an additional 350466 Shadow damage to players caught in the star burst blast. Each claimed territory brings Averzian's army closer to the March of the Endless .

spells.description: The Abyssal Voidshaper creates a shell that prevents Umbral Collapse from removing its Umbral Barrier .

spells.description: Marching Cosmetic Unlimited range Instant

spells.name: Pitch Bulwark

spells.description: Inflicts 34966 Shadow damage to enemies within 60 yards every 2 sec.

spells.description: The caster grants a shield to allies that absorbs the next 1324824 damage.

spells.name: Dark Barrage
spells.description: The caster hurls dark energy at several players, inflicting 60607 Shadow damage upon impact.

spells.name: Black Miasma
spells.description: The Abyssal Malus curses several players with a dark miasma, inflicting 97126 Shadow damage and reducing their haste by 70% for 15 sec.

spells.name: Domineering Presence
spells.description: Caster's presence coerces surrounding allies to fight harder, increasing their damage done by 25%.

spells.name: Darkness Calls
spells.description: Calls to the creatures of the void to assist the caster.

spells.name: Dark Strike
spells.description: Inflicts 77701 Shadow damage to an enemy and absorbs 496809 incoming healing.

spells.name: Swiftmend
spells.description: Requires Druid Instantly heal an ally for (165.92% of Spell Power).

spells.name: Nourish
spells.description: Heals a friendly target for (61% of Spell Power).  Receives 100% bonus from Mastery: Harmony .

spells.name: Moonfire
spells.description: Requires Druid Your [ Balance : Force of Nature treants / Restoration Grove Guardians ] cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every 6 sec.

spells.name: Harmony of the Grove
spells.description: Your [ Balance : Force of Nature treants / Restoration Grove Guardians ] cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every 6 sec.

spells.name: Power of Nature
spells.description: Requires Druid [ Balance : Your Force of Nature treants no longer taunt and deal 200% increased melee damage / Restoration Your Grove Guardians increase the healing of your Rejuvenation, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom by 10% while active ]

spells.name: Lightning Rod
spells.description: Your abilities have a chance to apply Lightning Rod to your target. Allies are granted 413 Critical Strike for 10 sec and enemies suffer 2635 Nature damage every 2 sec for 8 sec. When Lightning Rod ends, it returns to you, granting 413 Critical Strike for 10 sec.

spells.name: Death's Dirge
spells.description: L'ura sings a dreadful melody before marking players with a Dark Rune corresponding to each note. She then fires a sweeping laser, activating each Dark Rune hit.

spells.name: Resonance
spells.description: A Dark Rune hit in the correct order creates a transcendant toll, inflicting 135977 Cosmic damage to players within 3 yards.

spells.name: Dissonance
spells.description: A Dark Rune hit out of order creates an echoing clamor, silencing the target for 5 sec.

spells.name: Dark Rune
spells.description: Marked with a musical note, inflicting 19425 Cosmic damage every 1 sec. Upon activation, triggers either Resonance or Dissonance .

spells.name: Shattered Sky
spells.description: L'ura showers the chamber in infinite darkness, inflicting 40793 Shadow damage to all players every 1 sec for 25 sec.

spells.name: The Dark Archangel
spells.description: L'ura transfigures into an unholy weapon of godlike destruction, firing a cataclysmic blast that inflicts 34969305 Cosmic damage to all players.

spells.name: Safeguard Prism
spells.description: L'ura synthesizes a revolving bulwark of Safeguard Matrices, each reducing her damage taken by 33% for up to 20 sec.

spells.name: Disintegration
spells.description: L'ura's Prism disintegrates, inflicting 330229 Cosmic damage to all players as crystals splinter from her.

spells.name: Heaven's Glaives
spells.description: L'ura spins and unleashes whirling blades that eviscerate players on contact, inflicting up to (116551 * 5) Cosmic damage. The blades ricochet through the chamber, inflicting reduced damage as they lose speed.

spells.name: Thunderous Well
spells.description: The Darkwell rages with overflowing void, inflicting 13598 Cosmic damage to all players every 2 sec.

spells.name: Total Eclipse
spells.description: L'ura transfigures into a conduit within the Darkwell, regenerating her energy and applying Eclipsed to all players every 1 sec for 30 sec.

spells.name: Eclipsed
spells.description: Enveloped in refracting shadows, absorbing the next 26828 healing received.

spells.name: Black Tide
spells.description: The aftershocks trigger a wave of void to cascade from the Darkwell, inflicting 1864822 Cosmic damage and an additional 291378 Cosmic damage every 1 sec to players caught within.

spells.name: Heaven's Lance
spells.description: L'ura regenerates a halo of glass ornaments over time. Upon reaching 5 applications, she forges the glass into spikes that fire into her current target. Each impact inflicts 155402 Cosmic damage and applies Impaled .

spells.name: Impaled
spells.description: Glass spikes embed deep into flesh, inflicting 19425 Cosmic damage every 1 sec and increasing damage taken from Heaven's Lance by 50% for 25 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Dark Constellation
spells.description: L'ura calls down dark stars, inflicting 1942523 Cosmic damage within 2.5 yards of each impact. The stars interconnect, inflicting 194252 Cosmic damage to players within the patterns.

spells.name: Midnight

spells.name: Light Siphon
spells.description: L'ura invokes voracious rifts that hunger for light, inflicting 11655 Cosmic damage to players within 6 yards every (5 / 10) for up to 20 sec. Rifts that expire before they are satiated detonate in a Stellar Implosion .

spells.name: Stellar Implosion
spells.description: Space-time collapses, inflicting 854710 Cosmic damage to all players.

spells.name: Death's Requiem
spells.description: L'ura sings a dreadful melody before marking players with a Dark Rune corresponding to each note. Collision between marked players activates each Dark Rune .

spells.name: Severance
spells.description: L'ura transcends, diverging both players and her own being across two alternate dimensions. The violent division inflicts 213678 Cosmic damage to all players.

spells.name: Dimension Link
spells.description: L'ura's beings remain bonded across realities, inflicting 100% of their damage taken to each other.

spells.name: Dimension Breach
spells.description: Collision between players in opposite realities causes a dimensional rupture, ending their existence.

spells.name: Dark Quasar
spells.description: The Darkwell releases jets of excess void energy, inflicting 330229 Cosmic damage every 0.3 sec to players within them.

spells.name: Iris of Oblivion
spells.description: The surrounding iris of pure void atomizes any players attempting to escape.

spells.name: Criticality
spells.description: A chain reaction inflicts 233103 Cosmic damage within 5.5 yards of all players.

spells.name: Dark Meltdown
spells.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, L'ura activates the Darkwell's full potential, expelling all players with an astronomic blast inflicting 233103 Cosmic damage.

spells.name: Abyssal Pool

spells.name: The Darkwell
spells.description: The Darkwell's colossal void beam instantly vaporizes any player that dares to enter.

spells.name: Into the Darkwell
spells.description: L'ura exerts her cosmic grip upon all players, pulling them into the heart of the Darkwell.

spells.name: Void Cores
spells.description: Singularities within the Darkwell capable of containing infinite void energy.

spells.name: Cosmic Fission
spells.description: The Void Core opens, pulling all players towards it and inflicting 4856 Cosmic damage every 0.5 sec for 5 sec as their atoms are ripped away and consumed to create a Charged Core .

spells.name: Charged Core
spells.description: The Void Core brims with power, inflicting 1243215 Cosmic damage to players on contact.

spells.name: Core Harvest

spells.name: Starsplinter
spells.description: L'ura coalesces glass spikes that descend upon random players, inflicting 248643 Cosmic damage. Fractured shards erupt outward from each target, inflicting 1398617 Cosmic damage to any players hit.

spells.name: Galvanize
spells.description: L'ura fires electric beams at random players, each inflicting 174827 Cosmic damage to all players hit. Impact with a Void Core triggers Cosmic Fission .

spells.name: Decay
spells.description: Remaining Void Cores overheat and detonate, regenerating L'ura's energy. Each blast inflicts 1087813 Cosmic damage to all players and an additional 543907 Cosmic damage every 1 sec for 10 min. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Termination Prism
spells.description: L'ura synthesizes a revolving assault of Termination Matrices, each increasing her damage done by 33% for up to 20 sec.

spells.name: Grim Symphony
spells.description: It's time to face the music.

spells.name: Black Shroud
spells.description: Dark shadows encircle the chamber, pushing players towards the center.

spells.name: Overkill Current
spells.description: Excess power arcs between all players, inflicting up to 497286 Cosmic damage. Each player within the effect of Galvanize diffuses its overflow, reducing this damage.

spells.name: Severed Surge
spells.description: If either dimension is devoid of players, L'ura inflicts increasing Cosmic damage to all players every 1 sec.

spells.name: Void Dive

spells.name: Void Eruption

spells.name: Rebirth

spells.name: Void Blast
spells.description: The ember blasts a random player, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage.

spells.name: Naaru's Lament
spells.description: L'ura weeps alone, inflicting 582757 Holy damage to all players.

spells.name: Tears of L'ura
spells.description: When hit directly by Cosmic damage, the Dawn Crystal sheds tears of anguish inflicting 97126 Holy damage to players within 3 yards upon impact. Tears that fail to hit at least one player elicit Naaru's Lament .

spells.name: Glimmering
spells.description: The Dawn Crystal shimmers, inflicting 27195 Holy damage every 1 sec to the player holding it.

spells.name: Torchbearer
spells.description: Any player holding a Dawn Crystal becomes a beacon of hope for their allies, protecting players within 12 yards from the darkness of Midnight .

spells.name: Radiance
spells.description: While not held by a player, the Dawn Crystal surges with overwhelming light, inflicting increasing Holy damage to all players every 1 sec.

spells.name: Light's End
spells.description: The destruction of a Dawn Crystal induces utter despair, inflicting 372964 Holy damage to all players and increasing all damage taken by 500% for 10 min.

spells.name: Toxic Spores

spells.name: Putrid Burst
spells.description: After 12 sec the mushroom bursts, inflicting 76268 Nature damage, applying Toxic Spores to all players.

spells.name: Snowdrift
spells.description: Upon defeat, the Fractured Shivercore forms a pile of deep snow at its location. Players standing within have their movement speed reduced by 40% and are immune to forced movement effects.

spells.name: Glacial Torment
spells.description: The Sentinel of Winter assaults players with freezing temperatures, inflicting 40676 Frost damage every 2 sec for 16 sec.

spells.name: Raging Squall
spells.description: The Sentinel of Winter creates Raging Squall s, inflicting 177958 Frost damage to players within 2 yards of the impact location. These squalls wander the arena for 1.5 min, inflicting 61014 Frost damage every 1 sec to players within 0 yards.

spells.name: Eternal Winter

spells.name: Winter's Shroud

spells.name: Rimeshatter

spells.name: Rime Detonation
spells.description: Inflicts 40676 Frost damage to all players and roots them in place for 4 sec.

spells.name: Earthshatter Slam
spells.description: The Hoardmonger slams the ground, inflicting 254225 Nature damage to players in a frontal cone.

spells.name: Spoiled Supplies
spells.description: The Hoardmonger reaches into his sack and tosses rotten food over 7 sec, impacting targeted players for 50845 Nature damage or littering Rotten Mushroom s around the arena.

spells.name: Ravenous Bellow
spells.description: The Hoardmonger lets out a mighty roar, inflicting 86437 Physical damage to all players. Ignores armor.

spells.name: Resourceful Measures
spells.description: The Hoardmonger gathers from the nearest pile of resources, replacing one of his abilities with a new one.[][He can only retain one ability at a time.]

spells.name: Overflowing Supplies
spells.description: Gathering from his pile of mushrooms, the Hoardmonger gains Overflowing Supplies . This effect increases the amount of Rotten Mushroom s thrown during Spoiled Supplies .

spells.name: Hearty Bellow

spells.name: Bonespiked
spells.description: Broken bones litter the ground, inflicting 10169 Physical damage every 0.5 sec and reducing movement speed by 50%.

spells.name: Echoing Maul
spells.description: Nalorakk marks players for 4 sec, then sends an Echo of Nalorakk to their position. All Echoes of Nalorakk immediately inflict 101690 Nature damage to players within 8 yards.

spells.name: Fury of the War God
spells.description: Nalorakk headbutts Zul'jarra into a Concussive Shock , then commands the Echoes of Nalorakk to charge her position. These collide with the first target encountered casting Echoing Fury . Any Echo of Nalorakk that reaches Zul'jarra triggers Demoralizing Scream . Each Echo remains for one additional Fury of the War God , then vanishes.

spells.name: Concussive Shock
spells.description: Nalorakk disables Zul'jarra with a hefty blow. Unable to defend herself, she stands vulnerable to Nalorakk's echoes.

spells.name: Echoing Fury
spells.description: The charging Echo of Nalorakk ravages the first target in their path, inflicting 50845 Nature damage.

spells.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
spells.description: Nalorakk swipes repeatedly, obliterating his primary target for 4 sec, inflicting 203380 Physical damage every 1 sec and increasing Overwhelming Onslaught damage taken by 50% for 5 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Forceful Roar
spells.description: Nalorakk's shout resonates throughout the den, inflicting 91522 Physical damage and pushes away players for 3 sec. Ignores armor.

spells.name: Defensive Stance
spells.description: When Nalorakk casts Overwhelming Onslaught , Zul'jarra creates a protective barrier reducing damage taken from Overwhelming Onslaught by 50% to players behind her.

spells.name: Demoralizing Scream
spells.description: Zul'jarra cries out in pain from the undefended attack, inflicting 76268 Sonic damage to all players. Players feel the weight of her burden, increasing damage taken by 10% for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.description: The caster's mainhand strikes all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting 76268 Shadow damage.

spells.name: Void Lash
spells.description: The Dreadflail empowers its weapons, causing melee attacks to inflict 76268 Shadow damage in a cone in front of it for 8.3 sec.

spells.name: Flailstorm
spells.description: The Dreadflail fixates on a random enemy and spins their flails inflicting 15254 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to enemies within 7 yards of the caster.

spells.name: Nullify
spells.description: The Grand Nullifier conjures a blast of void energy at the target, inflicting 203380 Shadow damage.

spells.name: Dusk Frights
spells.description: The Grand Nullifier calls several frights to a void zone, fearing players within 5 yards of the impact for 5 sec.

spells.name: Umbral Lash
spells.description: Nysarra leaps to her primary target and unleashes consecutive slashes on them, inflicting 76268 Shadow damage with every strike and causing Void Gash on the final one.

spells.name: Lightscar Flare
spells.description: A fractured image of Lothraxion strikes at Nysarra, causing her wound to flare and stunning her for 18 sec. Players caught in the image's blast suffer 76228 Holy damage and are disoriented for 5 sec. Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by 30% and damage dealt to Nysarra by 300% but inflicts 35592 Holy damage every 1 sec until she recovers.

spells.name: Eclipsing Step
spells.description: Nysarra slips into the shadows and strikes at random players, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage and additional 20338 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec to all players within 14 yards.

spells.name: Null Vanguard
spells.description: Remnants of Nysarra's shattered command rise to defend and suppress.

spells.name: Void Gash
spells.description: Gashes the player, knocking them back and increasing all damage taken by 50% for 10 sec.

spells.name: Devour the Unworthy
spells.description: Nyssara channels the void to consume any surviving subordinates, restoring her own strength every 0.5 sec for 5 sec and triggers a burst of void energy inflicting 76228 Shadow damage to all players.

spells.name: Lightscarred
spells.description: Wounded by Lothraxion, Nysarra begins the encounter at 60% health. Fractured Images periodically tear into the arena, causing Lightscar Flare .

spells.name: Radiant Scar
spells.description: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts 50845 Holy damage every 1 sec to players within the area.

spells.name: Flicker
spells.description: Fractured Images periodically flicker to new locations, inflicting 101690 Holy damage and knocking away players in its path.

spells.name: Mirrored Rend
spells.description: Coming in contact with a Fractured Image rends the target, knocking them away and inflicting 50845 Holy damage with an additional 10169 Holy damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks and leaves behind Radiant Scar s.

spells.name: Arcane Zap
spells.description: Kasreth zaps the player, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage.

spells.name: Leyline Array
spells.description: A dangerous flow of Arcane power links between conduits inflicting 152535 Arcane damage when crossed and reducing their movement speed by 20% for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Reflux Charge
spells.description: Kasreth hurls a refluxing circuit on a random player inflicting 5 Arcane damage every 1 sec. Provides immunity while standing in Leyline Array as the circuit recoils and clears the effect, stunning the player for 1 sec.

spells.name: Corespark Detonation
spells.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, Kasreth overcharges a spark in the core engine and launches it at a random location, inflicting 127113 Arcane damage to all players within 14 yards of the impact. The detonation causes a Flux Collapse , leaving behind Arcane Spill s, and Sparkburn clings to all players.

spells.name: Flux Collapse
spells.description: Broken pipes leak excess power, inflicting 10 Arcane damage to enemies within 2.5 yards of the impact. Causes an Arcane Spill to form for 1.3 min.

spells.name: Arcane Zap
spells.description: Kasreth zaps the player, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage.

spells.name: Transference
spells.description: Imbues a target with a rerouting essence causing all incoming healing received by the target to be redirected to the caster. (2s cooldown)

spells.name: Arcane Explosion
spells.description: Inflicts 9 Arcane damage to all enemies every 2 sec.

spells.name: Searing Rend
spells.description: Lashes out with a precise, double-slash aimed at his current target. Each strike inflicts 22 Physical damage with an additional 4 Holy damage every 1 sec for 6 sec to any enemies within range and carves a Radiant Scar into the ground.

spells.name: Radiant Scar
spells.description: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts 10 Holy damage every 1 sec to players within the area.

spells.name: Luciferin Flare
spells.description: Unleashes a swarm of dazzling light, inflicting 15 Holy damage to all enemies in front of the caster and blinding them for 5 sec.

spells.name: Blistering Smite
spells.description: Inflicts 8 Holy damage to an enemy. Inflicts 5 Holy damage to an enemy every 1 sec for 6 sec.

spells.name: Nullwark Blast
spells.description: The Null Sentinel charges its shield with void and aims it at a player, inflicting 18 Shadow damage and an additional 7 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 12 sec.

spells.name: Dreadbellow
spells.description: The sentinel unleashes a dark roar, knocking back all players and inflicting 3 Shadow damage to them every 1 sec for 12 sec.

spells.name: Fixate
spells.description: Chases down a random target, ignoring everyone else for 8 sec.

spells.name: Cluster Weakness
spells.description: Increases damage taken from area of effect attacks by 20%.

spells.name: Mana Battery
spells.description: Mana Battery Instant

spells.name: Suppression Field
spells.description: Places a suppression field on an enemy, decreasing movement by 50% and pulsing out 5 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 10 sec. Additionally, if the enemy moves while being suppressed, they explode, inflicting 1 Arcane damage to themselves and all allies within 6 yards.

spells.name: Entropic Leech
spells.description: The herald imbues a random target with entropic essence absorbing the next 40 healing and leeching 5 health every 1 sec for 12 sec.

spells.name: Dark Beckoning
spells.description: The caster calls out to dark entities that travel outwards in erratic patterns, inflicting 14 Shadow damage to all enemies every 3 sec for 9 sec. The entities knock up the first target caught in its path, inflicting 25 Shadow damage.

spells.name: Leech Veil
spells.description: At 45% health, latches to an ally's shadow, hiding within and draining life to heal. The effect ends early if the shield on the leech victim is broken.

spells.name: Creeping Void
spells.description: Causes all enemies within 60 yards to take 10% increased Shadow damage for 15 sec. Inflicts 3 Shadow damage to enemies within 60 yards.

spells.name: Holy Bolt
spells.description: Inflicts 12 Holy damage to a random enemy.

spells.name: Burning Radiance
spells.description: The caster bursts with a holy radiance searing up to 2 nearby enemies, inflicting 5 Holy damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

spells.name: Arcing Mana
spells.description: The caster arcs beams of energy at players for 7.5 sec, inflicting 0 Arcane damage every 0.5 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Circuit Sense
spells.description: Erratic arcane energy arcs onto nearby devices, causing them to surge.

spells.name: Erratic Surge
spells.description: Energy surges off the caster inflicting 1 Arcane damage to enemies within 3 yards of the surge.

spells.name: Erratic Zap
spells.description: Chaotic energies surge into the ground, inflicting 23 Arcane damage to players within 4 yards of the impact and stunning them for 2 sec.

spells.name: Umbra Bolt
spells.description: Inflicts 12 Shadow damage to an enemy.

spells.name: Corespark Overload
spells.description: The battery overloads and explodes inflicting 6 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

spells.name: Forfeit Essence
spells.description: Funnels health into an ally.

spells.name: Null Sunder
spells.description: Melee attacks inflict 2 Shadow damage and reduce armor by 3%. Absorbs the next 10 healing received for 12 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Holy Echo
spells.description: Unstable light energies cause the caster to burst on death, inflicting 7 Holy damage to enemies and healing allies for 10% within 12 yards.

spells.name: Bedrock Slam
spells.description: Meittik strikes their primary target with immense force, inflicting 101690 Nature damage and 254225 Physical damage. The force of the impact ruptures nearby topsoil, creating patches of Fertile Loam .

spells.name: Fertile Loam
spells.description: Unearthed subsoil slows players standing within the effect by 50% and inflicts 40676 Nature damage every 1 sec.

spells.name: Bedrock Surge
spells.description: The impact of Bedrock Slam causes an aftershock that inflicts 20338 Nature damage to all players every 1 sec for 8 sec.

spells.name: Lightblossom Beam
spells.description: Kezkitt channels a beam of light on each Lightblossom Seed, inflicting 40676 Holy damage every 2 sec to players standing in the effect. The powerful beam rapidly germinates the seed, applying stacks of Light-Gorged . After 10 sec, the blossom casts Lightbloom Overgrowth . Standing within the beam stifles the seed's growth and prevents applications of Light-Gorged .

spells.name: Light Bolt
spells.description: Kezkitt inflicts 61014 Holy damage to a player.

spells.name: Lightsower Dash
spells.description: Lekshi dashes between patches of Fertile Loam , inflicting 101690 Holy damage to players in their path and sowing a Lightblossom at each destination.

spells.name: Thornblade
spells.description: Lekshi ambushes a player and backstabs them, inflicting 50845 Nature damage and causing them to bleed for 20338 Physical damage every 2 sec for 8 sec.

spells.name: Thicket's Trinity
spells.description: Meittik, Lekshi, and Kezkitt are bonded, causing them to share all damage taken.

spells.name: Fan Of Thorns
spells.description: Lekshi unleashes a flurry of thorns, inflicting 101690 Nature damage to players within 15 yards of their location every 1 sec for 3 sec.

spells.name: Light-Gorged
spells.description: The concentrated energy empowers the Lightblossom, increasing its damage inflicted by 50% with each application.

spells.name: Lightbloom Overgrowth
spells.description: The fully cultivated Lightblossom surges with energy, inflicting 7627 Holy damage to all players every 1 sec for 8 sec. Devoid of nutrients, patches of Fertile Loam wither into Light-Scorched Earth .

spells.name: Light-Scorched Earth
spells.description: The charred earth inflicts 50845 Holyfire damage every 1 sec to players standing within the effect.

spells.name: Bloodthorn Roots
spells.description: Roots entangle players, inflicting 30507 Nature damage and rooting them in place until destroyed.

spells.name: Thorncaller Roar
spells.description: Ikuzz roars, inflicting 50845 Nature damage to all players while Bloodthorn Roots erupt around it every 2 sec for 6 sec.

spells.name: Verdant Stomp
spells.description: Ikuzz stomps, inflicting 76268 Physical damage to all players and knocking them back. After 4 sec, Bloodthorn Roots emerge at players' locations.

spells.name: Lightcrazed Frenzy
spells.description: Ikuzz fully absorbs the power of the Lightbloom, increasing its movement speed by 20% and causing it to pulse 20338 Holy damage every 2 sec.

spells.name: Bloodthirsty Gaze
spells.description: Ikuzz fixates on a player, pursuing them for 10 sec. Upon reaching their target, Ikuzz will Incise them.

spells.name: Crushing Footfalls
spells.description: While fixating on a target, Ikuzz's massive footfalls inflict 30441 Nature damage to players and crush any Bloodthorn Roots within 7 yards every 1 sec.

spells.name: Incise
spells.description: Upon reaching its prey, Ikuzz chomps down on the player, causing them to bleed 101690 Physical damage every 1 sec for 3 sec.

spells.name: Crunched
spells.description: The player is stunned for 5 sec after being chewed up and spit out.

spells.name: Warden's Wrath
spells.description: Ruia blasts his current target with a bolt of energy, inflicting 25423 Nature damage.

spells.name: Lightfire
spells.description: Ruia shoots a beam of energy at a player, burning them for 33049 Radiant damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, Lightfire Beams emerge at the afflicted player's location.

spells.name: Lightfall
spells.description: Ruia calls down waves of falling Light energy, inflicting 152535 Holy damage to players within 4 yards of the impact.

spells.name: Pulverizing Strikes
spells.description: Ruia marks several targets and launches a wave of force toward each of them in a frontal cone every 2 sec for 6 sec. Each impact inflicts 76268 Physical damage to players within the effect and applies Pulverized .

spells.name: Grievous Thrash
spells.description: Ruia thrashes about, inflicting 81352 Physical damage to players and causing them to bleed an additional 20338 Physical damage every 1 sec for 20 sec or until fully healed. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Spirits of the Vale
spells.description: Ruia calls upon the spirits, casting Lightfire , Lightfall , Pulverizing Strikes , and Grievous Thrash every 8 sec until he is defeated.

spells.name: Pulverized
spells.description: Upon being struck by Pulverizing Strikes , players take 100% increased damage from Pulverizing Strikes for 6 sec.

spells.name: Mangling Claws
spells.description: While in Bear form, Lightwarden Ruia's melee attacks inflict 100%1 increased damage.

spells.name: Awaken the Lightbloom
spells.description: Ziekket sows Light energy into the soil, sprouting Lightspawn Lashers and reawakening any that are Dormant . Lashers reawaken with Vicious Regrowth .

spells.description: Upon reaching 1% remaining health, Lightspawn Lashers submerge themselves back into the ground, becoming unable to move and immune to player effects.

spells.name: Concentrated Lightbeam
spells.description: Ziekket releases a powerful beam of Light energy, inflicting 25423 Holy damage every 0.5 sec to players within the effect. Any Dormant Lightspawn Lashers hit by the beam are instantly liquified into puddles of Lightsap .

spells.name: Lightsap
spells.description: Viscous resin covers the ground, inflicting 81352 Holy damage every 2 sec to players standing within the effect and reducing their movement speed by 40%.

spells.description: Ziekket draws out globules of Lightbloom energy from the earth that move toward him, triggering a Fluorescent Outburst upon reaching him. The orbs instead burst when touched by players, granting that player Lightbloom's Might .

spells.name: Lightbloom's Might

spells.name: Lightspore Shot
spells.description: The lasher spews at a player, inflicting 30507 Holy damage.

spells.description: Ziekket impales the player with his spiked branch, inflicting 101690 Holy damage and knocking them back. The puncture wound causes the player to bleed an additional 30507 Physical damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

spells.name: Vicious Regrowth
spells.description: Lightspawn Lashers reawaken with renewed power, increasing their haste and damage done by 30%. This effect also makes them immune to interrupts and crowd controlling effects.

spells.name: Cosmic Spike
spells.description: Taz'Rah slashes his current target, inflicting 177958 Shadowstrike damage.

spells.name: Dark Rift
spells.description: Taz'Rah rips open a rift for 6 sec that pulls all players toward it, inflicting 29463  Shadow damage every 1 sec to them. Players who fall within the center of the rift suffer 91521 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

spells.description: Taz'Rah projects two shards toward a player. Each shard detonates on the first player it impacts inflicting 81352 Shadow damage. If both shards impact the player, that player suffers an additional 1016900 Shadow damage.

spells.name: Gather Shadows
spells.description: Taz'Rah teleports a short distance and summons Ethereal Shades to lash out at players.

spells.name: Provoke Creeper
spells.description: Atroxus agitates the surrounding pools, causing a Toxic Creeper to emerge and attack players.

spells.name: Poison Pool
spells.description: Atroxus's acidic venom inflicts 40676 Nature damage every 1 sec to players standing within it.

spells.name: Hulking Claw
spells.description: Atroxus delivers a powerful blow to a player that inflicts 127113 Nature damage with an additional 35592 Nature damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

spells.name: Toxic Aura
spells.description: The Toxic Creeper radiates a toxic cloud that inflicts 12711 Nature damage every 0.5 sec to players within 100 yards.

spells.name: Noxious Breath
spells.description: Atroxus breathes out Noxious Fumes in front of itself, inflicting 203380 Nature damage to players struck.

spells.name: Poison Splash
spells.description: Atroxus splashes poison around itself, inflicting 101690 Nature damage with an additional 30507 Nature damage every 1 sec for 5 sec to players struck. Each impact creates a poison pool for 1 min.

spells.name: Monstrous Stomp
spells.description: Atroxus inflicts 91521  Physical damage to all players, knocking them back.

spells.name: Lingering Poison
spells.description: Leaving a Poison Pool afflicts the player with a lingering poison, inflicting 25423 Nature damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.

spells.name: Sickening Bite
spells.description: The Toxic Creeper bites a player, causing them to suffer 10% increased Nature damage for 5 min. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Fixate
spells.description: The Toxic Creeper fixates upon a player.

spells.name: Void Cascade
spells.description: Charonus projects condensed cosmic power toward nearby players. Players coming into contact with this energy suffer 152535 Shadow damage and are knocked away.

spells.name: Gravitic Orbs
spells.description: Charonus summons a seeking Gravitic Orb near each player. The orb afflicts target player with Condensed Mass every 1 sec. If the orb comes within 6 yards of an Unstable Singularity, its essence is torn apart and the orb is destroyed.

spells.name: Cosmic Blast
spells.description: Charonus releases a massive blast, knocking back all players and inflicting 81352 Shadow damage to them with an additional 7627 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 20 sec.

spells.name: Unstable Singularity
spells.description: Charonus marks players and creates a gravity well at their location after 5.5 sec. Players within 12 yards of the well suffer 10169 Shadow damage every 1 sec and are slowly pulled toward the center. Players within 6 yards suffer an additional 50845  Shadow damage every 1 sec and have their movement speed reduced by 50%.

spells.name: Condensed Mass
spells.description: Gravitic Orbs fixate a player, inflicting 2542 Shadow damage every 1 sec and reducing their movement speed by 3%. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Burning Gale
spells.description: Emberdawn conjures a flaming windstorm that inflicts 20338 Fire damage every 1 sec to all players and pushes them for 16 sec.

spells.name: Searing Beak

spells.description: Emberdawn spits fire at a player, inflicting 25423 Fire damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, the fire forms into a flaming patch that inflicts 76268 Fire damage every 1.5 sec to players within it. The patch's central updraft inflicts 127113 Fire damage to players who touch it, knocking them away.

spells.name: Ignited Embers
spells.description: Fiery remains inflict 76268 Fire damage every 1.5 sec to players within. The patch's central updraft inflicts inflicts 127113 Fire damage to players who touch it, knocking them away.

spells.name: Flaming Twisters
spells.description: Ignited Embers react to the winds from Burning Gale , ejecting fiery tornadoes that inflict 127113 Fire damage to players struck and stun players hit for 2 sec before tossing them away.

spells.name: Fire Breath
spells.description: Emberdawn breathes a cone of fire towards a player, inflicting 203380 Fire damage to players hit.

spells.name: Shadow Bolt

spells.name: Debilitating Shriek
spells.description: Kalis continually releases piercing shrieks, inflicting 25423 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec and increasing their damage taken from Debilitating Shriek by 30% for 3 sec. This effect stacks. Latch's Heaving Yank interrupts this ability.

spells.name: Curse of Darkness
spells.description: Kalis curses players, causing Dark Entities to fixate upon them for 12 sec.

spells.name: Broken Bond
spells.description: When either Kalis or Latch falls in battle, the other becomes incensed, increasing their damage done by 50% every 5 sec.

spells.name: Splattering Spew
spells.description: Latch spews bile onto players, inflicting 61014 Nature damage to players within 5 yards of each impact and applying Splattered . Gunk Splatter forms at the impact locations.

spells.name: Gunk Splatter
spells.description: Latch's bile coats the ground, inflicting 76268 Nature damage every 1.5 sec to players within it and increasing their damage taken from Splattering Spew by 100%.

spells.name: Heaving Yank
spells.description: Latch throws a hook towards a player, pulling the first target hit to his location. If a player is struck, Latch follows up with Heaving Chop .

spells.name: Bone Hack
spells.description: Latch chops his primary target, inflicting 203380 Physical damage every 0.75 sec for 3 sec.

spells.name: Heaving Chop
spells.description: Latch strikes the hooked player, inflicting 101690 Physical damage and stunning them for 4 sec.

spells.name: Splattered
spells.description: Latch's bile inflicts 12711 Nature damage to players hit every 1 sec for 10 sec.

spells.name: Rampage
spells.description: Commander Kroluk focuses his destructive urge on his current target, repeatedly thrashing them and inflicting 101690 Physical damage every 0.5 sec for 5 sec.

spells.name: Intercepting Charge
spells.description: The Haunting Grunt charges toward their current target and inflicts 61014 Physical damage.

spells.name: Rallying Bellow
spells.description: Commander Kroluk unleashes a bloodthirsty warcry, inflicting 88979 Physical damage to all players and summoning a warparty to fight alongside him.

spells.name: Bladestorm

spells.name: Reckless Leap
spells.description: Commander Kroluk recklessly leaps towards the furthest player, inflicting 76268 Physical damage and an additional 20338 Physical damage every 1 sec for 12 sec to players within 12 yards of the impact location. The force of the impact causes Falling Rubble .

spells.description: The Spectral Axethrower throws an axe at a player, inflicting 40676 Physical damage and causing them to bleed for 15254 Physical damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

spells.name: Shield Wall
spells.description: Commander Kroluk fortifies himself, reducing his damage taken by 99%.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description: The Phantasmal Mystic sends lightning into a player, inflicting 61014 Nature damage. The lightning then jumps to the closest other player.

spells.name: Intimidating Shout
spells.description: Commander Kroluk bellows an intimidating shout, causing players who stand alone to run in fear and suffer 50845 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

spells.name: Flame Nova
spells.description: The Phantasmal Mystic unleashes a nova of flame, inflicting 76268 Fire damage to all players.

spells.name: Falling Rubble
spells.description: Falling debris rains from the ceiling, inflicting 152535 Nature damage to players within 4 yards of each impact location.

spells.name: Bullseye Windblast
spells.description: The Restless Heart fires an arrow at a location in its chamber, inflicting 203380 Nature damage to players within 20 yards of impact and forming Billowing Wind .

spells.name: Billowing Wind
spells.description: A ring of violent wind expands, inflicting 61014 Nature damage every 1 sec to players who touch it and stunning them for 4 sec.

spells.name: Arrow Rain
spells.description: The Restless Heart shoots a rain of arrows, inflicting 127113 Nature damage to players within 3.5 yards of each impact and forming Turbulent Arrows .

spells.name: Tempest Slash
spells.description: The Restless Heart knocks away its primary target, inflicting 330493 Physical damage and increasing their Physical damage taken by 40% for 10 sec. Afterward, The Restless Heart fires a Gust Shot .

spells.name: Bolt Gale

spells.name: Squall Leap

spells.name: Storming Soulfont
spells.description: A stormy spirit inflicts 76268 Nature damage to players standing within its storm pool every 1 sec. Gust Shot quells these spirits.

spells.name: Throw Axe
spells.description: Inflicts 8 Physical damage to a player.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description: The caster sends lightning into a player, inflicting 12 Nature damage. The lightning also jumps to another player closest to the victim.

spells.name: Ephemeral Bloodlust
spells.description: The caster sends its allies into a frenzy, increasing their haste by 35% for 15 sec.

spells.name: Flame Nova
spells.description: The Phantasmal Mystic unleashes a nova of flame, inflicting 76268 Fire damage to all players.

spells.name: Intercepting Charge
spells.description: The Haunting Grunt charges toward their current target and inflicts 61014 Physical damage.

spells.name: Shoot
spells.description: The caster shoots an arrow at a player, inflicting 8 Physical damage.

spells.name: Fierce Slash

spells.description: The caster coats their blades with poison, causing attacks to inflict 5 Nature damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Acidic Demise
spells.description: Acid leaks from the caster's corpse, inflicting 10 Nature damage to players within it every 1 sec.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.description: The caster sprays poison at players, inflicting 8 Nature damage and an additional 4 Nature damage every 1 sec for 12 sec.

spells.name: Gore Whirl
spells.description: The caster spins violently for 8 sec, inflicting 3 Physical damage every 0.5 sec to players within 6 yards.

spells.description: Crawth faces a random player and flaps her wings, inflicting 254476 Nature damage and knocking back all players in front of her.

spells.name: Play Ball!
spells.description: The goals of The Pitch activate, allowing players to score points in either the Goal of the Searing Blaze or the Goal of the Rushing Winds.

spells.name: Goal of the Searing Blaze
spells.description: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Searing Blaze triggers a Firestorm .

spells.name: Goal of the Rushing Winds
spells.description: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Rushing Winds triggers Gale Force .

spells.name: Roving Cyclone
spells.description: Creates cyclones that move around, inflicting 127113 Nature damage and knocking back any player it contacts.

spells.name: Sonic Vulnerability
spells.description: Increases damage from Deafening Screech by 50%. This stacks. This is removed by scoring 3 points in one of the goals.

spells.name: Ruinous Winds
spells.description: At 75% and 45% health, Crawth unleashes a devasting gust of winds every 3 sec, inflicting 101690 Nature damage to all players and knocking them back.

spells.name: Blistering Fire
spells.description: Fire emits searing heat that inflicts 17796 Fire damage every 2 sec to all players.

spells.name: Peck
spells.description: Territorial Eagle pecks at the target, causing them to bleed 10169 Physical every 1.5 sec for 6 sec.

spells.name: Gust
spells.description: Knocks all enemies in front of the caster back. Inflicts 177750 Nature damage to all enemies in front of the caster.

spells.name: Raging Screech
spells.description: The caster unleashes a resounding shriek, increasing the attack speed of all nearby eagles by 50% for 10 sec and inflicting 76268 Sonic damage to enemies within 60 yards.

spells.name: Expel Intruders
spells.description: Knocks all enemies within 30 yards of the caster back. Inflicts 152814 Nature damage to enemies within 30 yards.

spells.name: Storm Slash
spells.description: Inflicts 127113 Nature damage to an enemy.

spells.name: Deadly Winds
spells.description: Stuns an enemy, rendering it unable to move or attack for 2.5 sec. Inflicts 101690 Nature damage to an enemy.

spells.name: Arcane Expulsion
spells.description: Vexamus ejects a mass of arcane energy inflicting 228901 Arcane damage to players in front of it.

spells.name: Mana Bombs
spells.description: Vexamus infuses up to 3 players with explosive mana, inflicting 25423 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 4 sec. Upon expiration, the mana will detonate inflicting 50845 Arcane damage within 4 yards and leaving a pool of Corrupted Mana for 1 min.

spells.name: Mana Bomb

spells.name: Corrupted Mana
spells.description: Corrupted Mana inflicts 91564 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players inside and reduces their movement speed by 30%.

spells.name: Arcane Orbs
spells.description: The Professor conjures enchanted orbs from the magic book that inflict 152535 Arcane damage within 3 yards of impact and begin to gravitate towards Vexamus. If an orb is absorbed by Vexamus, the elemental inflict 61175 Arcane damage to all players. If an orb is absorbed by a player, it will inflict 50987 Arcane Damage to them.

spells.name: Arcane Fissure
spells.description: 3 sec cast Upon reaching 100 energy, Vexamus explodes with overwhelming power inflicting 81352 Arcane damage to all players and pushing them back.

spells.name: Return to Book
spells.description: The creature's essence is recalled back to the Magic Book.

spells.name: Monotonous Lecture
spells.description: Bores the target to sleep with a stodgy lesson.

spells.name: Mana Void
spells.description: Infuses the target with a corrupted void, inflicting 17796 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, the void condenses inflicting 50845 Arcane damage and draining 10000 Mana from players within 4 yards.

spells.name: Surge
spells.description: Inflicts 177958 Arcane damage to target enemy.

spells.name: Astral Whirlwind
spells.description: The caster unleashes a whirlwind of arcane energy, inflicting 35592 Arcane damage to all players within 6 yds every 0.5 sec for 5 sec.

spells.name: Celestial Forbearance
spells.description: Cannot be affected by Celestial Shield for 1 min.

spells.name: Arcane Smash
spells.description: Inflicts 91521 Arcane damage to enemies within 100 yards.

spells.name: Astral Bomb

spells.name: Celestial Forbearance
spells.description: Cannot be affected by Celestial Shield for 1 min.

spells.name: Arcane Bolt
spells.description: Inflicts 61014 Arcane damage to an enemy.

spells.name: Barkbreaker
spells.description: The Overgrown Ancient stomps its target with crushing force, inflicting 244246 Physical damage and increasing Physical damage taken by 100% for 9 sec.

spells.name: Branch Out
spells.description: The Overgrown Ancient throws one of its own branches at a location, inflicting 152535 Physical damage to players within 8 yds and knocking them back. The Ancient Branch then animates and attacks players.

spells.name: Germinate
spells.description: The Overgrown Ancient forces dormant lasher seeds beneath all players' feet to sprout every 1 sec for 4 sec. Each emerging seed inflicts 127113 Physical damage to players within 4 yds and knocks them back, then leaves behind a dormant Hungry Lasher.

spells.name: Burst Forth
spells.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, the Overgrown Ancient releases its abundant life magic to awaken all dormant Lashers, inflicting 81352 Nature damage to all players as they burst free from the ground.

spells.name: Dormant
spells.description: Life energy suppressed by nearby Vile Lashers.

spells.name: Splinterbark
spells.description: Splinters erupt from the Ancient as its branch is torn away, causing all players to bleed for 50845 every 3 sec for 1 min. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Healing Touch
spells.description: Heal an ally for 393273.

spells.name: Abundance
spells.description: Upon death, release a spark of life energy that bursts after 3.5 sec, healing allies and players within 8 yds for 655456, and removing all applications of Splinterbark .

spells.name: Lasher Toxin
spells.description: The Hungry Lasher's attacks have a chance to poison the target, inflicting 5085 Nature damage every 3 sec for 9 sec. This effect stacks.

spells.name: Arcane Rift
spells.description: The excess power coalesces into a rift of arcane energy, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within. This rift occasionally releases Uncontrolled Energy .

spells.name: Vicious Ambush
spells.description: Ambushes the target in a whirl of energy inflicting 61014 Arcane damage to players within 6 yards and knocking them back. Arcane energy lingers on the damaged players for 8 sec, inflicting 61014 damage every 5.2 sec.

spells.name: Riftbreath
spells.description: The Ravager channels a breath of powerful energy, inflicting 30507 Arcane damage every 0.3 sec for 2.5 sec.

spells.name: Vicious Lunge
spells.description: Lunges at the target and bites them inflicting 45761 Physical damage.

spells.name: Encounter Event

spells.name: Gale Force
spells.description: Fierce winds rush out of the goal, knocking Crawth in the air and pushing players back and summoning Roving Cyclones for 15 sec. Each mote can be picked up to grant 45% Haste and 50% movement speed for 20 sec. This effect also provides immunity to being pushed by Gale Force .

spells.name: Detonation Seeds

spells.name: Seed Detonation

spells.name: Vile Bite

spells.name: Agitation

spells.name: Darting Sting
